tasks.name: Book a morning family llama farm tour for 4 people costing $100 or less
tasks.description: Use the tours section to book a Family Llama Farm Tour for 2 adults and 2 children on a specific Saturday, selecting a morning time slot and adjusting options so the total tour price is $100 or less, then proceed to the booking summary page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Tours & Activities” option in the main navigation menu.
On the tours listing page, click the card or link labeled “Family Llama Farm Tour.”
On the Family Llama Farm Tour page, open the date picker and select a Saturday on the 15th of any month (for example, July 15).
In the time slot section, select a start time between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM; if multiple morning time slots are available, choose the earliest listed.
Use the quantity controls to set the number of participants to 2 adults and 2 children.

Read the total price displayed for the selected date, time, and group size; if the total is more than $100, reduce the number of children by 1 using the quantity control and reselect the earliest morning time slot that brings the total to $100 or less while keeping at least 3 total participants.
In the add-ons section, select the “Picnic Basket” option; if more than one picnic option is shown, choose the one with a price closest to $15.
Click the primary call-to-action button labeled “Add to Cart” or “Continue to Checkout” to move to the booking summary page with this tour reservation.

tasks.name: Add 3 pairs of llama wool socks under $25 with 4+ stars to the cart
tasks.description: Find llama wool socks in the farm shop, filter by price and rating, select only medium size socks under $25 with ratings of 4.0 stars or higher, and add exactly 3 different pairs to the shopping cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Farm Shop” or “Store” option in the main navigation menu.
In the shop categories sidebar or menu, click on the “Clothing & Accessories” category and then select the “Socks” subcategory if it is available; otherwise, use the main Clothing list.
On the socks listing page, locate the price filter and set the maximum price to $25, then apply the filter.
Locate the rating filter and choose to show only items with a rating of 4.0 stars or higher.
Use any size filter or variant selector to filter or choose only socks available in size “Medium.”

Scroll through the filtered product list and click on the first three different sock products that meet all criteria (under $25, 4.0+ rating, medium size), opening each product page in turn and selecting “Medium” from any size dropdown if required.
On each of those three product detail pages, set the quantity to 1 and click the “Add to Cart” button so that a total of 3 distinct pairs of socks are added to the cart.

tasks.name: Request a llama birthday party package for 10 children on a June Saturday
tasks.description: Use the events or parties section to select a children’s llama birthday party package for 10 kids on a Saturday in June, choose an indoor-friendly option, add a cupcake upgrade, and submit an inquiry form with specific contact details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Parties & Events” or “Birthday Parties” link in the main navigation or homepage sections.
On the parties page, select the package labeled “Llama Birthday Party” or the closest children’s birthday party option.
On the party package page, use the date picker to select a Saturday in June (for example, the second Saturday of June, such as June 10).
In the group size or guests section, set the number of children to 10 using the quantity controls; if there is an adults field, set it to 2.
If there are options for indoor versus outdoor or “Indoor-friendly” packages, select the option that specifies indoor space or all-weather coverage.
In the add-ons or upgrades list, select the “Cupcake” or “Birthday Cupcake Upgrade” option; if multiple dessert upgrades are available, choose the one that specifically mentions cupcakes.

Click the “Request Booking” or “Inquire Now” button to open the inquiry form, then fill in required fields including name (e.g., “Alex Rivera”), email (e.g., “alex.rivera@example.com”), phone number (e.g., “555-123-9876”), and a short message stating that you are requesting a llama birthday party for 10 children on the selected June Saturday before clicking the “Submit” button.

tasks.name: Build a 2-day weekend itinerary with a farm tour, llama walk, and fiber workshop
tasks.description: Create a weekend itinerary where Day 1 has a farm tour and a llama walk in the morning, and Day 2 has a fiber arts workshop, ensuring all activities fall on the same weekend and start before 1:00 PM, then add all three activities to a shared itinerary or booking cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Plan Your Visit” or “Itinerary Builder” option in the main navigation; if not present, click “Tours & Activities.”
Use any date selection widget to choose a Saturday as Day 1 (for example, the first Saturday of a month, such as May 6) and a Sunday immediately following that Saturday as Day 2 (for example, May 7).

On the activities list for the selected Saturday (Day 1), locate and select a general “Llama Farm Tour” activity, choosing a start time that begins before 11:00 AM; if multiple options exist, pick the earliest time.

Still for Day 1, locate an activity labeled “Llama Walk” or “Guided Llama Walk” and select a start time that also begins before 1:00 PM; if more than one time is available, choose the one starting closest to 11:00 AM.
On the activities list for the selected Sunday (Day 2), locate a “Fiber Arts Workshop,” “Llama Fiber Spinning,” or similar fiber-related workshop, and select a start time that begins before 1:00 PM.
For each of the three selected activities, set the number of participants to 2 using the quantity controls or guest fields.

Use the provided “Add to Itinerary,” “Add to Plan,” or “Add to Cart” button for each activity so that all three (farm tour, llama walk, and fiber workshop) are included together in a single itinerary summary or booking cart for that weekend.

tasks.name: Purchase a $75 digital gift card with a llama-themed design and scheduled delivery
tasks.description: Use the gift cards section to select a digital gift card worth exactly $75, choose a card design that features llamas, set it to be emailed to a friend with a custom message, and schedule the delivery for a specific future date.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Gift Cards” link in the main navigation or footer.
On the gift cards page, select the “Digital Gift Card” option rather than any physical card option.
On the digital gift card configuration form, enter the amount as $75, either by typing “75” in the amount field or choosing the $75 preset amount if it exists.
Scroll through the available gift card designs and select one that clearly includes a llama image or llama-themed artwork.

In the recipient information section, enter the recipient’s name (e.g., “Jamie Lee”) and email address (e.g., “jamie.lee@example.com”), and type a short custom message such as “Happy birthday! Enjoy a day with llamas on me.”
Use the delivery date picker or scheduling field to choose a delivery date at least 7 days in the future from today’s date (for example, the 15th of next month).
Click the “Add to Cart” or “Proceed to Checkout” button so that the $75 llama-themed digital gift card with scheduled delivery is placed into the cart ready for purchase.

tasks.name: Register one person for a llama fiber workshop under $60 using a promo code
tasks.description: Find a beginner-level llama fiber or spinning workshop, ensure the price is under $60 after applying a promo code, register for a single attendee on the earliest available date, and proceed to the checkout form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Workshops & Classes” or “Education” section in the main navigation.

On the workshops list, locate a class titled “Beginner Spinning with Llama Fiber,” “Intro to Llama Fiber,” or another beginner-level fiber workshop, and click its title to open the workshop detail page.
On the workshop page, use the date selector to choose the earliest available date listed for that workshop.
In the pricing or registration section, set the number of attendees to 1 using the quantity or guest selector.
If a promo code field is available on the workshop page or in the registration popup, type “LLAMA10” into the promo code field and apply it.

Read the updated workshop price and ensure that the listed total for 1 attendee is less than $60 after the promo is applied; if it is not, return to the workshop list and choose another beginner-level llama fiber workshop with a base price low enough that applying “LLAMA10” reduces it below $60, then repeat the date, attendee, and promo steps for that workshop.
Click the “Register,” “Book Now,” or “Add to Cart” button to move to the checkout or registration summary page with the single discounted workshop registration.

tasks.name: Book a 2-night stay in a Llama View Cabin with breakfast for under $300
tasks.description: Use the lodging section to book a 2-night stay in the Llama View Cabin for 2 adults between specific dates, choose an option that includes breakfast, and select dates and options so that the total stay cost is under $300 before taxes, then proceed to the reservation details page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Lodging & Stays” or “Farm Stays” option in the main navigation.
On the lodging overview page, select the accommodation labeled “Llama View Cabin” or the closest similarly named cabin option.

On the Llama View Cabin detail page, use the check-in date picker to choose the 10th of a month (for example, August 10) and the check-out date picker to choose 2 nights later (for example, August 12).
Set the number of guests to 2 adults and 0 children using the guest selector or occupancy controls.

Locate any rate plan or package options and select a plan that explicitly includes breakfast (for example, “Bed & Breakfast” or “Cabin + Breakfast”); if more than one breakfast-inclusive plan is available, choose the cheapest breakfast-inclusive rate plan.

Read the total stay price before taxes displayed for the selected dates and rate; if the total exceeds $300, adjust the stay by choosing different nearby dates within the same month or selecting an alternative breakfast-inclusive plan until the total is less than or equal to $300.
Click the “Reserve,” “Book Now,” or “Continue” button to proceed to the reservation details or guest information page with the selected 2-night Llama View Cabin stay.

tasks.name: Submit a school field trip request for 25 students on an October weekday
tasks.description: Use the group visits or schools section to configure an educational llama farm field trip for 25 students on a weekday in October, choose an Animal Care focus and a 2-hour duration with bus parking, and submit the quote request form with specific school contact details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the “Groups & Schools” or “Field Trips” option in the main navigation.
On the school visits or field trips page, select the option labeled “School Field Trip” or the closest school-specific group package.
Use the date picker to choose a weekday (Monday through Friday) in October, such as the first Wednesday of October (for example, October 4).
In the group size section, set the number of students to 25 and the number of adult chaperones to 3 using the quantity controls.
Locate any “Educational Focus” or “Program Type” dropdown and select the option labeled “Animal Care” or the closest equivalent that focuses on animal welfare or handling.
If there is a visit duration selector, choose a 2-hour visit option; if multiple 2-hour time blocks are available, select the one starting between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM.
In the transportation or amenities section, select the checkbox or option indicating “Bus Parking Needed” or “School Bus Parking.”

Click the “Request Quote,” “Inquire,” or similar button to open the request form, then fill in fields including school name (e.g., “Oak Ridge Elementary”), contact name (e.g., “Morgan Davis”), email (e.g., “m.davis@oakridge.edu”), and phone number (e.g., “555-789-4321”) before clicking the final “Submit” button to send the field trip request.

entities.name: TourActivity
entities.description: Bookable tours and on-farm activities such as Family Llama Farm Tour and Llama Walk

entities.name: ActivitySession
entities.description: Dated time slots for a specific tour/activity (e.g., Family Llama Farm Tour at 9:00 AM on July 15)

entities.name: Addon
entities.description: Configurable add-ons such as Picnic Basket and Cupcake Upgrade

entities.name: TourActivityAddon
entities.description: Mapping between tour activities and available add-ons (e.g., Picnic Basket for Family Llama Farm Tour)

entities.name: PartyPackageAddon
entities.description: Mapping between party/group packages and add-ons (e.g., Cupcake upgrade on Llama Birthday Party)

entities.name: Workshop
entities.description: Educational workshops and classes such as Beginner Spinning with Llama Fiber

entities.name: WorkshopSession
entities.description: Dated offerings of a workshop (e.g., earliest available Intro to Llama Fiber date)

entities.name: LodgingProperty
entities.description: On-farm accommodations such as the Llama View Cabin

entities.name: RatePlan
entities.description: Rate plans for lodging properties, including breakfast-inclusive options

entities.name: RatePlanCalendar
entities.description: Date-specific nightly rates and availability for a rate plan

entities.name: ProductCategory
entities.description: Categories for shop products, used for navigation and filtering

entities.name: Product
entities.description: Retail products in the farm shop such as llama wool socks

entities.name: ProductVariant
entities.description: Variants of products (e.g., sock sizes like Medium)

entities.name: GiftCardProduct
entities.description: Gift card products (digital and physical) available for purchase

entities.name: GiftCardDesign
entities.description: Artwork designs for gift cards, including llama-themed options

entities.name: GiftCardPurchase
entities.description: Configured gift card purchases with recipient details and scheduled delivery

entities.name: PartyPackage
entities.description: Configurable group offerings such as Llama Birthday Party and School Field Trip

entities.name: GroupPackageInquiry
entities.description: Inquiry and quote requests for birthday parties and school field trips

entities.name: Itinerary
entities.description: Multi-day visit plan including farm tours, llama walks, and fiber workshops

entities.name: ItineraryItem
entities.description: Individual scheduled activities within an itinerary (tour sessions and workshop sessions)

entities.name: PromoCode
entities.description: Promotional codes such as LLAMA10 used to discount workshops or other items

entities.name: Cart
entities.description: Shopping and booking cart (single active cart for the agent)

entities.name: CartItem
entities.description: Line items within the cart, covering products, tours, workshops, lodging, gift cards, and group inquiries
